---
title: "The Theory of Quantum Information: Notes"
number-sections: true
number-depth: 3
toc: true
toc-depth: 3
---

# Chapter 1: Mathematical Preliminaries {#chapter-1-watrous}

{{< include chapter1/_1.1-linear-algebra.qmd >}}

{{< include chapter1/_1.2-analysis.qmd >}}

# Chapter 2: Basic Notions {#chapter-2-watrous}

{{< include chapter2/_2.1-registers-and-states.qmd >}}

{{< include chapter2/_2.2-quantum-channels.qmd >}}

{{< include chapter2/_2.3-measurements.qmd >}}

# Chapter 3: Similarity and distance among states and channels {#chapter-3-watrous}

{{< include chapter3/_3.1-quantum-state-discrimination.qmd >}}

{{< include chapter3/_3.2-fidelity.qmd >}}

{{< include chapter3/_3.3-trace-distance.qmd >}}
